title: paeonia albiflora var. edulis
intro: Paeonia albiflora var. edulis, also known as the Chinese peony, is a plant species that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, Paeonia albiflora var. edulis is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving blood circulation, and boosting the immune system. Paeonia albiflora var. edulis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its roots and rhizomes can also be used to make medicinal extracts and tinctures.
